prerequisites: A SavvyCal account with access to Developer Settings (https://savvycal.com/developers).
A SavvyCal personal access token generated from Developer Settings, used as the connector's api_key. Tokens have the form pt_secret_...

authMethods.name: Personal access token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a SavvyCal personal access token supplied in the connector's api_key field. SavvyCal authenticates API requests with the Authorization: Bearer header, using a token of the form pt_secret_XXXX against the base URL https://api.savvycal.com/v1.

setupSteps.title: Create a personal access token in SavvyCal
setupSteps.body: Sign in to SavvyCal and open Developer Settings at https://savvycal.com/developers. Click "Create a token", give it a name, and copy the generated token (it begins with pt_secret_). Store it securely, as it grants API access to your account.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector api_key
setupSteps.body: Paste the personal access token into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as Authorization: Bearer <token> when calling the SavvyCal API at https://api.savvycal.com/v1.
